einkpush2.title: EinkPush 2
einkpush2.description: Export your feeds as EPUB files optimized for e-ink readers and push them to remote endpoints.
einkpush2.screen_help: Used for the EPUB viewport metadata.
einkpush2.font_size_help: Relative to the default e-reader font size.
einkpush2.readability_url_help: Optional: URL to a compatibility-layer for full-text extraction (e.g. fivefilters/readability-container).
einkpush2.sources_help: Select which categories or favorites to include in your exports.
einkpush2.push_help: Configure how EPUBs are sent to your e-reader or server.
einkpush2.push_endpoint_help: The URL that accepts POST requests with the EPUB file.
einkpush2.push_cron_help: Standard cron format (e.g. '0 6 * * *' for daily at 6 AM).
einkpush2.push_retries_help: Number of retry attempts if push fails.
einkpush2.push_cron_cmd_help: Copy this command to your server's crontab.
einkpush2.msg_no_articles: No new articles found for the selected sources.
